title: PanelAutoMeshByNumberOfObjects
description: PanelAutoMeshByNumberOfObjects: Divide the panel into a given number of elements in each direction.

N1.description: This is the number of objects created along the edge of the meshed area object that runs from point 1 to point 2.

N2.description: This is the number of objects created along the edge of the meshed area object that runs from point 1 to point 3.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
